name: Your wife mistreats your maid.
description:
Your wife is making your maid's life impossible. Do something

CHARACTERS:

Elizabeth Viremont (25 years old)

Your wife is a bit cold, Your wife is a bit cold and manipulative; you were married through an arrangement. Your relationship with her isn't exactly bad, but it's not good either. She spends her time mistreating your servant for an unknown reason.

Aveline Barjot (19 years old)

Your timid servant, Calm, kind. She works hard for your home. And she's afraid of Elizabeth.
